nodes.context: Mexican criminal organization originally composed of remnants of La Familia Michoacana, based in Michoacán.
Mexican drug cartel based in Michoacán, now defunct.
Short-lived joint enforcer gang formed by Sinaloa Cartel, Gulf Cartel, La Familia Michoacana and Knights Templar.
Active cartel in Michoacán as of June 2020.
Active cartel in Michoacán as of June 2020.

edges.evidence_quote: The Knights Templar Cartel ... was a Mexican criminal organization originally composed of the remnants of La Familia Michoacana drug cartel
edges.context: Knights Templar Cartel was formed from remnants of La Familia Michoacana.

edges.evidence_quote: Before its collapse, the cartel took full control of the now defunct La Familia Michoacana operations
edges.context: Knights Templar Cartel took control of La Familia Michoacana's operations.

edges.evidence_quote: A large part of La Familia Michoacana left with them to form the Knights Templar group, while José de Jesús Méndez Vargas kept the leadership of the then greatly diminished 'Familia Michoacana', starting a fight for the control of Michoacán.
edges.context: A split occurred: part of La Familia Michoacana formed Knights Templar, leading to conflict between the two.

edges.evidence_quote: The Sinaloa Cartel, Gulf Cartel, La Familia Michoacana and the Knights Templar formed a short-lived joint enforcer gang called Cárteles Unidos
edges.context: Sinaloa Cartel and Knights Templar cooperated as part of Cárteles Unidos.

edges.evidence_quote: The Sinaloa Cartel, Gulf Cartel, La Familia Michoacana and the Knights Templar formed a short-lived joint enforcer gang called Cárteles Unidos
edges.context: Gulf Cartel and Knights Templar cooperated as part of Cárteles Unidos.

edges.evidence_quote: Cárteles Unidos ... composed of well-trained gunmen dedicated to killing and expelling Los Zetas Cartel operatives
edges.context: Cárteles Unidos was formed to fight Los Zetas.

edges.evidence_quote: The Templars' most recent feud was against the Jalisco New Generation Cartel
edges.context: Knights Templar Cartel was in a feud with Jalisco New Generation Cartel.

edges.evidence_quote: its leader ... were reported to have been killed by remnants of La Nueva Familia Michoacana Organization
edges.context: Knights Templar Cartel leader was killed by La Nueva Familia Michoacana Organization.

edges.evidence_quote: on their way to a regional meeting with members of the Jalisco New Generation Cartel to form an alliance with them
edges.context: Knights Templar Cartel was planning an alliance with Jalisco New Generation Cartel.

edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Gulf Cartel, Beltrán-Leyva Cartel, Sinaloa Cartel
edges.context: Infobox lists Gulf Cartel as an ally.

edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Gulf Cartel, Beltrán-Leyva Cartel, Sinaloa Cartel
edges.context: Infobox lists Beltrán-Leyva Cartel as an ally.

edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Gulf Cartel, Beltrán-Leyva Cartel, Sinaloa Cartel
edges.context: Infobox lists Sinaloa Cartel as an ally.

edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Jalisco New Generation Cartel, Juarez Cartel, MS-13, Los Zetas, Independent Civilian vigilante and Militia groups, Gente Nueva, La Familia Michoacana
edges.context: Infobox lists Jalisco New Generation Cartel as a rival.
